title: Part One: AI Is Coming for Your Children
description:
Robert sits down with Ben Bowlin to talk about the flood of AI-generated children's books con-artists are putting on Kindle. Not only are they off-putting and bad, they might represent a serious threat to literacy itself.

https://shatterzone.substack.com/
